column1: # Hand-authored HGVS expressions filling gaps left by the vendored
# corpora. Each line is `<HGVS expression><TAB><reason>`. The parser
# harness consumes the first column and asserts each line PARSES. Lines
# starting with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# Sourced from the HGVS Nomenclature site examples
# (https://hgvs-nomenclature.org/) and from the empty cells reported by
# g. deletions, insertions, delins, inv, equals

column2: r.ins (lowercase per RNA convention — may go through known_skips)
